nodes.name: 索諾拉州
nodes.summary: 索諾拉州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联28种鸟类，包括Gambel's quail、Elegant quail、Clark's grebe等28种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Thorn forest
nodes.summary: Thorn forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联22种鸟类，包括Lesser ground cuckoo、Tawny-collared nightjar、青绿阔嘴蜂鸟等22种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 聖路易斯波托西州
nodes.summary: 聖路易斯波托西州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括白腹绿蜂鸟、Tamaulipas pygmy owl、White-crowned parrot等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 恰帕斯州
nodes.summary: 恰帕斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联34种鸟类，包括角冠雉、小灰頭稚冠雉、眼斑吐綬雞等34种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 瓜纳卡斯特省
nodes.summary: 瓜纳卡斯特省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Nutting's flycatcher、Olive-backed euphonia，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Nutting's flycatcher
nodes.summary: Nutting's flycatcher（Nutting's flycatcher，学名 Myiarchus nuttingi），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in western and central Mexico from Sonora south to Chiapas and east in San Luis Potosí and Hidlago

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in western and central Mexico from Sonora south to Chiapas and east in San Luis Potosí and Hidlago

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in western and central Mexico from Sonora south to Chiapas and east in San Luis Potosí and Hidlago

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the Mexican interior in Oaxaca and Chiapas and from there south on the interior Pacific slope through Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, and Nicaragua into northwestern Costa Rica's Guanacaste Province

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | pages =404–405 }} In northern Central America it also is found in thorn forest and in Costa Rica in more humid forest than further north. In elevation overall it ranges from sea level to though only to in Costa Rica

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: flavidor is found more coastally on the Pacific slope from Oaxaca and Chiapas south to western Nicaragua. Nutting's flycatcher inhabits forest and scrublands in the tropical and lower subtropical zones
